calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-08-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner William Gargano, Clerk: Carla Amador CSR: Susan Crozier #4761 (Department 218)

Appearances:
Petitioner, Celia Quetzal Laluz, is present in propria persona.

This matter comes on calendar this day for an Order to Show Cause hearing re Change of Name. Proof of Publication received and ordered filed. Petitioner is sworn and examined by the Court.

The matter having been submitted and no objections having been made to the proposed change of name made at the hearing, it appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: CYD QUETZAL LA LUZ. Decree is submitted and signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-25-2007 Off Calendar
